location: Dropped by Horned Warrior enemies (dual curved-sword-wielding elites); the most reliable farm is the Horned Warrior patrolling the stairwell doorway right next to the Small Private Altar Site of Grace in Belurat, Tower Settlement.
tactics: From the Small Private Altar grace in Belurat, Tower Settlement, go through the nearby doorway and up the stairs to find a dual-wielding Horned Warrior — a resettable farm spot since it's steps from a grace.
Drop rate is low, so plan on resting and refighting it several times.
Horned Warriors dual-wield curved swords with fast combos and can slam one into the ground for a holy horn burst (their own Horn Calling) — don't stand still after their combo strings end.
Other Horned Warriors carrying the same sword patrol the Belurat swamp and near the Ravine North grace in the Ancient Ruins of Rauh, as backup farm spots.
lore: A curved sword carried by the horned tower-guardians of Belurat, its tangle of ornamental horns doubling as a focus for their horn-calling rite — letting the wielder slam the blade down and summon horns up from the earth.

builds.name: Quality Strength/Dexterity
builds.why: D scaling in both Strength and Dexterity with low requirements (11/14) makes it an easy early pickup for a quality build, and it auto-equips a matching second blade when two-handed.
